description: Skills referenced by team-bootstrap roles. Skills are external to this repo — install separately from your skill marketplace of choice (e.g. /plugin install <name>, or git clone into ~/.claude/skills/). Run bin/check-skills.sh to verify presence before invoking the relevant pipelines.

recommended.name: tavily-research
recommended.purpose: Multi-source cited research — 2026 SaaS comps, patent landscape, Glassdoor / Levels.fyi data, foundation-model TOS verification

recommended.name: competitor-analysis
recommended.purpose: SWOT, positioning, differentiation across direct + adjacent competitors. Core skill for market-analyst.
recommended.fallback: WebSearch + manual analysis (significantly more tokens and less structured)

recommended.name: 30x-seo-ai-visibility
recommended.purpose: Empirically measures brand visibility across ChatGPT / Claude / Perplexity / Gemini / Google AI Overview. Answers 'can LLMs reach our JTBD?' directly instead of by speculation.
recommended.fallback: WebSearch each LLM platform manually (extremely token-expensive, less reliable)

recommended.name: data-storyteller
recommended.purpose: Narrative reports with charts, audits, comparisons, statistical summaries. Turns cohort tables into executive-ready output.
recommended.fallback: Raw tables in markdown (readable but not investor-punchy)

recommended.name: research-synthesis
recommended.purpose: Synthesize interview transcripts, support tickets, NPS open-text, exit surveys into themes + segment patterns + prioritized insights.

recommended.name: web-scraper
recommended.purpose: Structured extraction from competitor pricing pages, Glassdoor reviews, OSS license pages

optional.name: find-keywords
optional.purpose: Demand-side validation — search-volume signal for the segment
optional.fallback: skip — most DD doesn't need keyword landscape

optional.name: anthropic-skills:xlsx
optional.purpose: Parse .xlsx / .xlsm / .csv exports of financial models, cohort tables, retention data
optional.fallback: Convert spreadsheets to CSV first, parse with Read+Grep (manual, error-prone for formulas)
optional.note: Bundled with Anthropic skill pack; available as `anthropic-skills:xlsx`

optional.name: anthropic-skills:pdf
optional.purpose: Parse audited financials (PDF), contract PDFs (MSAs, DPAs), produce memo PDF deliverables

optional.name: anthropic-skills:docx
optional.purpose: Parse Word contract templates; produce memo as .docx deliverable

required.name: humanize
required.purpose: Bypasses AI-detection signals on outbound public content. **Pipeline-blocking** for partnerships-lead (outreach + co-launch comms) and community-manager (every published community post + moderation). Recommended for stakeholder-communicator + whimsy-injector (graceful fallback).
required.fallback: **No fallback for partnerships-lead + community-manager** — role returns status:blocked. Other roles degrade with manual humanization.

required.name: humanize-ai-text
required.purpose: Reduces AI-detection patterns in personal communications. **Pipeline-blocking** for CSM (renewal/expansion/at-risk sequences) and community-manager (ambassador program copy). Recommended for stakeholder-communicator (release comms), documentation-agent (end-user docs), incident-responder (customer status updates).
required.fallback: **No fallback for CSM + community-manager** — role returns status:blocked. Other roles degrade with manual humanization.

required.name: persona-customer-support
required.purpose: Customer-management framework. **Pipeline-blocking** for CSM (health framework + onboarding triage). Used non-blocking by community-manager (moderation), product-marketer (ICP), ux-designer + ux-researcher (persona constraints from real support).
required.fallback: **No fallback for CSM** — fails QA. Graceful fallback for other roles.

required.name: research-synthesis
required.purpose: Synthesize raw research into themes + segment patterns. **Pipeline-blocking** for CSM (VoC theme extraction). Recommended for ux-researcher (primary research synthesis), business-analyst (requirements from research), product-manager (prioritization from research signals), community-manager (community VoC), ux-designer (research before flow design).
required.fallback: **No fallback for CSM** — fails QA on theme density. Graceful fallback for other roles.

required.name: idea-refine
required.purpose: Divergent → convergent narrowing. **Pipeline-blocking** for partnerships-lead (thesis convergence audit trail). Recommended across 7 other roles for greenfield decisions where multiple valid options exist.
required.fallback: **No fallback for partnerships-lead** — fails QA on convergence rigor. Graceful fallback for other roles.

recommended.name: competitor-analysis
recommended.purpose: SWOT + positioning + differentiation analysis. Used by 9 roles across the full pipeline — install once, used many times.
recommended.fallback: WebSearch + manual analysis (acceptable but slower and less structured)

recommended.name: tavily-research
recommended.purpose: Multi-source cited research. Used by 9 roles for research with citations. Critical for legal-compliance-checker (2026 regulation changes quarterly).

recommended.name: documentation-and-adrs
recommended.purpose: ADR-grade decision records + runbook structure + README patterns + changelog conventions. Used by 14 roles — the canonical documentation pattern across the pipeline.
recommended.fallback: Manual decision-record writing (acceptable but inconsistent structure across team)

recommended.name: test-driven-development
recommended.purpose: Red→green→refactor discipline. Behavioral tests, not implementation-coupled. Used by 5 implementation + quality roles.

recommended.name: code-review-and-quality
recommended.purpose: Multi-axis code review framework: correctness, readability, architecture, security, performance. Used by 5 review roles.
recommended.fallback: Subjective style preference (less rigorous; misses systemic issues)

recommended.name: data-storyteller
recommended.purpose: Executive-ready narrative reports + cohort analysis + charts. Used by 5 roles producing exec-level dashboards.
recommended.fallback: Raw markdown tables (loses narrative + escalation framing)

recommended.name: copywriter
recommended.purpose: Compelling marketing / product / community copy. Used by 7 communication-facing roles.

recommended.name: spec-driven-development
recommended.purpose: Forces specification before development. Used by 5 strategic + architecture roles to prevent scope drift.

recommended.name: planning-and-task-breakdown
recommended.purpose: Ordered tasks with acceptance criteria + dependency mapping. Used by 5 planning-side roles.

recommended.name: doubt-driven-development
recommended.purpose: Fresh-context adversarial review patterns. Used by 4 review-side roles for high-stakes decisions.

recommended.name: frontend-ui-engineering
recommended.purpose: Production-quality UI patterns + design-system adherence + anti-AI-aesthetic principles. Used by 4 UI-touching roles.
recommended.fallback: Manual reference (less coherent system; generic AI aesthetic)

recommended.name: brief
recommended.purpose: Editor-ready content brief structure. Used by 4 content-producing roles.

optional.name: source-driven-development
optional.purpose: Grounds implementation decisions in official documentation; prevents hallucinated APIs.

optional.name: incremental-implementation
optional.purpose: Atomic task structure with verification between steps; prevents big-bang delivery failures.

optional.name: api-and-interface-design
optional.purpose: Stable interfaces hard to misuse; composition-over-configuration; type contracts at boundaries.

optional.name: security-and-hardening
optional.purpose: OWASP-aligned input validation; auth/authz; secrets handling; LLM prompt-injection patterns.

optional.name: debugging-and-error-recovery
optional.purpose: Systematic root-cause approach; not guess-fix-retry.

optional.name: code-simplification
optional.purpose: Refactor patterns that reduce complexity without changing behavior.

optional.name: browser-testing-with-devtools
optional.purpose: Real-browser runtime data via Chrome DevTools MCP. DOM inspection, console errors, network, performance profiling.

optional.name: web-performance-audit
optional.purpose: Core Web Vitals measurement (LCP, INP, CLS); CWV budget enforcement.

optional.name: performance-optimization
optional.purpose: Profile-driven optimization patterns; bottleneck-first; not premature micro-optimization.

optional.name: ci-cd-and-automation
optional.purpose: Canonical CI/CD patterns; quality gates; test runners in CI; deployment strategies.

optional.name: shipping-and-launch
optional.purpose: Pre-launch checklist, monitoring setup, staged rollout, rollback triggers, post-deploy validation.

optional.name: deprecation-and-migration
optional.purpose: Safe deprecation patterns; coexistence period; data migration strategies.

optional.name: git-workflow-and-versioning
optional.purpose: Conventional commits, atomic changes, clean history.

optional.name: context-engineering
optional.purpose: Optimization patterns for LLM context management; degradation mitigation; task-switching.
optional.fallback: Ad-hoc context handling (degrades unpredictably at scale)

optional.name: 30x-seo-ai-visibility
optional.purpose: Empirical brand visibility data across ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity/Gemini/Google AI Overview. Same skill also used by audit-dd market-analyst.
optional.fallback: WebSearch each LLM platform manually (extremely token-expensive)

optional.name: ai-seo
optional.purpose: AEO/GEO content strategy + LLM citation optimization (different methodology from classical SEO).

optional.name: seo-aeo-best-practices
optional.purpose: Schema, structured data, JSON-LD, answer-first content blocks, EEAT.
optional.fallback: Manual research per pattern (high token cost)

optional.name: seo-audit
optional.purpose: Technical SEO baseline audit + issue prioritization.

optional.name: seo-geo
optional.purpose: Generative Engine Optimization — compound SEO + AEO across regions + engines.

optional.name: find-keywords
optional.purpose: Prioritized keyword list with demand + intent mapping. Same skill optionally used by audit-dd market-analyst.

optional.name: programmatic-seo
optional.purpose: Template-driven page generation for 100s/1000s of pages.

optional.name: backlink-analyzer
optional.purpose: Authority gap analysis vs competitors. Used by growth-marketer (digital PR strategy) and partnerships-lead (content/SEO partner scoring, conditional).
optional.fallback: Manual backlink audit via third-party tools

optional.name: social-media-posts
optional.purpose: Platform-specific content (LinkedIn / Twitter / Reddit / Facebook / Instagram) with hooks + character limits + hashtag strategy.

optional.name: image-generation
optional.purpose: Reference visuals — custom iconography (ui-designer), ambassador badges + event banners + reaction visuals (community-manager), micro-visuals (whimsy-injector).
optional.fallback: Source from existing libraries; commission custom separately

optional.name: web-scraper
optional.purpose: Structured extraction from websites. Used by discovery-research (competitor data) and legal-compliance-checker (platform policy text). Also used by audit-dd roles.

optional.name: web-scraper
optional.purpose: Structured extraction from the landing page(s) and platform screens during grounding.

optional.name: tavily-research
optional.purpose: Cited research on how comparable products frame the same JTBD (optional context for use-case mining).
